TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-holiday_kalaeh a _oemaw

S.FORM: isahini' kaysa'an 'ita' koSa'en pasan kinolol a.
S.TRANSL: 「今天咱們來聊聊掃墓節的事。」
"Today is our Tombsweeping Day,"

S.FORM: nimon noka saywalo' nak'ino 'am 'am patabil ka kinolol.
S.TRANSL: 「你們東河的人是怎樣祭祖掃墓呢。」
"How do you pay respects to the dead in Tungho?"

S.FORM: yami hiza so: nakhini rimrim'anan o: isahini kaysa'an ma hoN.
S.TRANSL: 「如果我們天亮時去那裡。」
"If we go there at dawn."

S.FORM: hm papaha:ih minsa'la' hiyahiya minsa'la' So: minsa'la' kayzaeh.
S.TRANSL: 「我們那邊如果早上 ... ... 今天呀，看看誰先到，如果最先到的就最好了。」
"Whoever arrives ahead, to arrive ahead is good."

S.FORM: hiya' maybi:il atomal o: 'angangen nasia koSa'en 'ampowa' kin ma'ngel.
S.TRANSL: 「誰最晚到，就會被罵說：『為什麼會這麼晚到呢？』」
"Whoever comes last will get a scolding."

S.FORM: nom talboewah isaa nak'isaza.
S.TRANSL: 「然後我們就砍草。」
"We do some weeding."

S.FORM: 'aehae' sinraehoe' potngor ila saboeh isaa ma' sizaeh ila talboewahan kayzaeh ila.
S.TRANSL: 「一個姓的人全部到了，然後砍草的工作都做好了，全部的人就可以吃了。」
"The weeding should have been finished (once all the clans have arrived)."

S.FORM: sizaeh ila isaa ma 'a'ayna:a' yami to:o' sinraehoe'.
S.TRANSL: 「祭拜完了，然後我們（每一個人）就等三個姓的人通通到齊。」
"After we finish (weeding), we wait for the others. There are three clans altogether."

S.FORM: o: m kaybaybaw o: baba:i'.
S.TRANSL: 「（等）高姓跟風姓的人（來）。」
"The Kaybaybaws and the Babais."

S.FORM: m maray aleb a.
S.TRANSL: "We pass by the bridge."

S.FORM: a isaa o: kaspinatabil hiza tekteken saboeh si'aelen ila risaza.
S.TRANSL: 「然後把祭品全部剁成一塊一塊，然後吃掉。」
"The food to be offered has to be cut/sliced."

S.FORM: ehe So: sizaeh ila isaa ma' tabin 'amet isa lobih ila.
S.TRANSL: 「吃完然後就回家了。」
"Right. After eating we return home."

S.FORM: haysia.
S.TRANSL: 「還在（喝），哈哈。」
'(They were) still (drinking).'

S.FORM: isaa isahini kayzaeh so: 'aehae' taew'an 'aehae' kinae'hae'an ma' isaa.
S.TRANSL: 「 ... ... 然後，如果一家（帶）一瓶酒的話，然後 ... ... ,」
"Now the situation is much better. So if each household brings one bottle, "

S.FORM: 'al'alak hara ra'oe o: wa'wa'isan saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 「年輕人這樣喝酒好像（每個人）都很行。」
"The young people were very good drinkers. (There might not be enough wine.)"

S.FORM: iska nonak baiw niya'om m 'am 'akoy ma' 'akoy hara.
S.TRANSL: 「我們自己要買多也可以買多，像 ... ... 。」
"If you want to buy more you can buy more."

S.FORM: a tata'a 'aeyam hoN.
S.TRANSL: 「雞啊，豬肉呀，還有 ... ... 反正三牲就是啦。」
"Chicken, pork, or anything, as long as there are three kinds."

S.FORM: oh o ??.
S.TRANSL: 「還有水果啦，」
"Also fruits."

S.FORM: oh tintinawbon hara'.
S.TRANSL: 「還有像糯米糕。」
"And ricecakes."

S.FORM: oh isaa baiw ka isaa sipatabir ?? si'aelen saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 「然後就買那些東西來祭拜，之後就把那些吃光光。」
"You buy the food for offering, and then eat them afterwards."

S.FORM: oh 'okay alibih ray taew'an.
S.TRANSL: 「沒有帶回家。」
"You never take them home."

S.FORM: oh 'oka' i: kosa.
S.TRANSL: 「沒有說（可以帶回家）。」
"Nobody says (you can't take them home)."

S.FORM: a isikil sinraehoe' hiza'.
S.TRANSL: 「沒有說跟其他姓的人區分。」
"We don't distinguish between different clans."

S.FORM: i moyo 'aehae' sinraehoe' hiza ma ma ta sisasaboehen no isaa sisabaiw ka isaa ka patabir o:.
S.TRANSL: 「你們那邊一個姓的人替其他人買祭品給大家。」
"One clan helps buy the things needed for everybody"

S.FORM: 'oka' yami 'okay saseme: ka rayhil.
S.TRANSL: 「我們這兒是沒有捐錢的。」
"No. We don't contribute money."

S.FORM: m sason ray a a pasbaki' nara ka rayhil sisiroton hiza pasankinolol nonak ba:iw koza'.
S.TRANSL: 「在那裡 ... ... 啊 ... ... 祖靈祭的話錢就蒐集在一起；那個是掃墓節，自己買多少（就多少）。」
"We contribute money for the pasbaki celebration. But we buy for our own on tombsweeping."

S.FORM: m arasen sipatabir.
S.TRANSL: 「東西帶過去拜拜，」
"Take them to be offered."

S.FORM: lobih isaa.
S.TRANSL: 「然後回來家裡，」
"Then come home."

S.FORM: sia si'aelen saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 他們把東西全部吃完。
"Then consume everything."

S.FORM: a 'okay alibih ka ray taew'an.
S.TRANSL: 「沒有（把祭品）帶回家裡。」
"Never taking them home."

S.FORM: uhN hiya' malibih ma' isaa itayso'on.
S.TRANSL: 「如果有誰（把祭品）帶回家，（我們）也不會管。」
"We don't care if somebody takes them home."

S.FORM: So: 'am malibih ka alibih o: isaa.
S.TRANSL: 「如果要帶回去家裡，也可以（讓他們）帶回家裡。」
"What needs to be taken home should be taken home."

S.FORM: ai eh noka 'inaz'azema komoSa: sia ila hiza marke.
S.TRANSL: 「（我們）心裡就會想說：『他是個吝嗇鬼。』」
"(We know) he's a miser."

S.FORM: niyaom rini raremewan kosa yami paspaso: sinraehoe'.
S.TRANSL: 「我們向天湖這兒是 ... ... 我們每個姓的人呀 ... ... 。」
"Here in Xiangtianhu, each clan buys their own things for offering."

S.FORM: ah' o to:o' sinraehoe' hini rini raremewan.
S.TRANSL: 「向天湖這兒有三個姓 ... ..。」
"There are three clans here in Xiangtianhu."

S.FORM: noka sayna'ase: lasia ma' isaa lasia nonak maksasome ba:iw.
S.TRANSL: 「然後芎姓他們 ... ... 他們自己捐錢來買東西。」
"The Sayna'ases contribute money to buy the things they need."
"We titiun ... "

S.FORM: ai titiyon mwa:i' kanyami.
S.TRANSL: 「芎姓的人來朱家這兒，我們 ... ...。 」
"The Sayna'ases come to us Titiuns."

S.FORM: sememel ka rayhil 'oyae ba:iw.
S.TRANSL: 「我們朱家捐錢(給他們)，也一起買東西。」
"We Titiuns also contribute money and buy the things together."

S.FORM: a tilsa saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 「一塊兒(買)。」
"We help each other."

S.FORM: 'aehae' anoka baba:i' ma' nak'isaa 'oyae.
S.TRANSL: 「風家他們也是那樣做的。」
"The Babai clan also does that."

S.FORM: nak isaa o:.
S.TRANSL: 「那樣喔。」
"I see."

S.FORM: a isaso nak kaysa'an hara ma So: hiya' pinabilis ka rayhil ma' isaa isaa rima' ba:iw ka.
S.TRANSL: 「像 ... ... 像今天 ... ... 誰負責這筆錢，就(負責)去買東西。」
"The person in charge of the money has to buy the things."

S.FORM: ai a So: baiwin ma' isaa baiwin mwa:i' arasen ila rini raremewan.
S.TRANSL: 「買到了然後就帶到向天湖這裡。」
"After buying the things, they take them here to Xiangtianhu."

S.FORM: yami' hini ka kama talek ka 'aeyam ka tinawbon hara ka katawbonon.
S.TRANSL: 「我們這裡負責煮豬肉和糯米糕。」
"We here take care of cooking the meat and the rice-cakes."

S.FORM: isaso: kaspatabir 'arasen ray taew'an rini si'aelen ray'isaso ray kakololan.
S.TRANSL: 「把祭拜過的東西帶到家裡吃,還是在墓園那裡吃?」
"Do you take the food offerings home, or eat them there at the graveyard?"

S.FORM: ray kinkinololan zi'saza ma sipaplangi anoka saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 「大家把食物帶到舊墓那裡一起吃。」
"Everybody takes the food to the graveyard where we gather to eat."

S.FORM: 'okay 'ameti ma' isaa alibihin isaa so:.
S.TRANSL: 「沒有吃完就可以帶回家。」
"Leftover food is taken home."

S.FORM: hiya' nihiya' 'ameten ma' isaa.
S.TRANSL: 「吃完(是最好)。」
"(It is good) if one's food is entirely consumed."

S.FORM: ma 'ameten hiza haysani ila sa' isaa.
S.TRANSL: 「現在沒有那樣了。」
"Nowadays it's not the same anymore

S.FORM: 'a'akoy ila ka 'ae'aewhaey so: rima' pabaiwin.
S.TRANSL: 「買太多不好。」
"It's not good to buy too much meat."

S.FORM: aeyam hayza o: lampez tintin sam'iyaeh tintin hini'.
S.TRANSL: 「如果買個十斤二十斤的豬肉。」
"If you need to buy meat, there will be around ten to twenty kilos."

S.FORM: hini 'aehae' so: kik haebae:aen ka mae'iyaeh mwa:i' isaa pa'apolon hini 'am ino'an nanaw poa'aw 'am amet.
S.TRANSL: 「如果沒有太多人來,那如何吃完所有的東西呢?」
"How could you consume everything if you buy too much food?"

S.FORM: isaa ma' isaa' alibihin ray taew'an.
S.TRANSL: 「要把它們帶到家裡。」
"You have to take them home."

S.FORM: ay 'a'apolon naehaen so: mwa:i' inaray kinololan.
S.TRANSL: 「如果從墓地回來,還要再分(帶回家的食物)嗎?」
"From the graveyard, are the food taken home still going to be distributed?"

S.FORM: ma rihaw ray kinkinololan hihiwaeen hihiwaeen.
S.TRANSL: 「在墓園那裡切成一塊一塊的。」
"They are sliced at the graveyard."

S.FORM: nakhini 'am patabir ma isaa hini ray asang ma' rima' ka saboeh ka korkoring tatini' matna'amet ila isaa o:.
S.TRANSL: 「像這樣的祭拜,全部都要去。」
"In rituals like this, everybody in the neighborhood goes."

S.FORM: uN So: sizaeh ila 'ita' makakpeh mwa:i' ray taew'an ila hiza.
S.TRANSL: 「如果拜完了,我們就各自回家。」
"Once we finish, we separate ways and go home."

S.FORM: So: mwa:i' hiza lasia in inay kam rawas hiya' kosa: a komsi'ael ma' isaa mak'aehae' a kanman.
S.TRANSL: 「從遠地來的人,如果有人要吃中飯,有時候可以去我那邊。」
"If somebody wants to have lunch, they sometimes (come) to my house."

S.FORM: ila hiza kala mini' isaa ila hiza kala kalih a ta:aw.
S.TRANSL: 「他們可能到Mini的家或到Kalih-a-taaw的家。」
"They either come to Mini's house or to Kalih-a-taaw's house."

S.FORM: pa'pa'apolon naehaen so: hiya 'am kala hiya' 'am komsi'ael ma' isaa kita' ila lasia nonak.
S.TRANSL: 「他們自己決定要在誰那裡吃午餐。」
"They themselves decide where to have lunch."

S.FORM: 'am paspaso sinraehoe ila o:.
S.TRANSL: 「要各個姓氏自己決定。」
"Each clan makes their own decisions."

S.FORM: ma' e nasia baba:i' ehe baba:i' ma' isaa kalababa:i' nonak ma ksi'ael risa.
S.TRANSL: 「風姓的人在風家吃午餐」
"The Fengs have their lunch at the Feng homes."

S.FORM: niyam niya'om So: isa inaray kinkinololan mwa:i' isa kaspinatabir 'arasen.
S.TRANSL: 「從墓地帶回祭品。」
"The offerings brought from the cemetery"

S.FORM: nihiya' 'akoy titi'an.
S.TRANSL: 「誰（拿到）的多一點。」
"Who gets more?"
「沒關係。」
"It didn't matter."

S.FORM: siroton saboeh hihiwa'en ila si'ael ila.
S.TRANSL: 「所有的祭品全部集合一起，切一切來吃。」
"All the offerings are gathered together, sliced and eaten."

S.FORM: m isaa kamoenhael isaa 'aewhaey.
S.TRANSL: 「去年就不好。」
"It was bad last year."

S.FORM: 'i'ini' kosa si'ael ila potoy ila paphahai potoy ila a ato.
S.TRANSL: 「還沒開始吃之前，有人已經在搶著打包他們要吃的了。」
"Before the meal even started, people were already packing food for themselves."

S.FORM: m aroma' 'am si'ael ila ka tatini' 'am ima raroton o:.
S.TRANSL: 「當其他人在吃的時候，（為了大家的聚會）老人還在收。」
"The elders were still gathered for meeting when people started eating."

S.FORM: potoyon ila.
S.TRANSL: 「（吃的東西都）打包好了。」
"(The food were already) packed."

S.FORM: kamoenhal isaa nakisaa 'aewhaey。.
S.TRANSL: 「去年很不好。」
"It was so bad last year."

S.FORM: isahini kaysa'an 'am manabih lasia.
S.TRANSL: 「今年他們已經被說了。」
"They were already told ( ... ) this year."

S.FORM: 'am kayzaeh ila koSa:.
S.TRANSL: 「情況已經改善了。」
"The situation has improved."

S.FORM: uh 'izi' 'izi' potoy.
S.TRANSL: 「(大家還沒吃之前)不打包。」
"Don't pack (before everybody has eaten)."

S.FORM: uN si'ael naehaen o: So: kayni' ila isaa.
S.TRANSL: 「先吃，如果還有剩下的（lit.別人不要的）,」
"Eat first, then if there are any leftovers (that nobody wants),"

S.FORM: aras aroma' 'aewhaey 'izik kosa 'a 'a'apol So: nihiya 'am koSa mari' ila.
S.TRANSL: 「別提怎麼分配食物，那是不能說的，如果你想要帶回家，直接做就好了」
"Don't mention about distributing the food. That's taboo. If say you want to bring home food, then you go ahead."

S.FORM: kaysa'an nakhara.
S.TRANSL: 「今天就像是那樣。」
"Today it's like"

S.FORM: eN niya'om isaa hiza talo sasaboehen noka aniyami'a inoka titiyon no ma isa yami nonak hiwa' ka 'aeyam tinawbon.
S.TRANSL: 「我們切我們（要）的豬肉和糯米糕。」
"We slice our own meat and rice-cakes."

S.FORM: 'a'apol ma' isaa 'a'apol ma' ta 'a'apol ma' isaa pa'apol ka saboeh ila hiza sipaysiri ila hiza ray sinrahoe.
S.TRANSL: 「我們把食物分給各姓的人。」
"We distribute them to all the clans."

S.FORM: ya mina isaso:.
S.TRANSL: "就在那兒。"
"over there."

S.FORM: hiza m aroma so: 'oka' o: hara a'.
S.TRANSL: 「如果沒有其他事。」
"If there is nothing else,"

S.FORM: aroma' o: a tata:a' 'aeyam nanaw isaa ma' kayzaeh siyamez ila kayzaeh siamez ila kayzaeh.
S.TRANSL: 「雞肉和豬肉可以混合在一起。」
"It's good to mix the chicken and pork together."

S.FORM: m e si'ael ma' si'ael ila saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 「大家一起吃。」
"Everybody shares the food."

S.FORM: kakhayza'an 'okik haebae'aen mae'iyaeh kayzaeh.
S.TRANSL: 「以前人不多, 很好。」
"There were not many people before, which is good."

S.FORM: so: patabir o: mwa:i' o: ray ra:an ray kapsiwazayan isaa o: masmasa:eng.
S.TRANSL: 「如果來拜拜（拜好之後）在交叉路口休息。」
"At tomb-sweeping, everybody gets down below the cemetery to sit down."

S.FORM: m si'aelen kayzaeh kik 'akoy ayra:i' o.
S.TRANSL: 「可以吃的不多。」
"Good to eat. Not much food. They're placed on the ground."

S.FORM: eN masmasaeng isaa si'aelen rae'oe mil'amet.
S.TRANSL: 「把東西擺在地上, 坐著就吃了, 乾杯。」
"put things on the ground, then sit down and eat and drink"

S.FORM: ah haysani 'oka'o: so: roemae'oe mil'akoy kakhayza'an ma' pinobae:aeh 'okik 'akoy a.
S.TRANSL: 「現在不一樣了, 如果一喝酒就喝多. 以前酒也不多。」
"It's not the same nowadays. Once you start to drink, you tend to drink too much. There was not much wine in those days."

S.FORM: a binbinisitan rima' sisapih mwa:i' raerae'oe eh.
S.TRANSL: 「酒瓶拿去換酒來喝。」
"People used to take bottles in exchange for wine to drink."
